Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Personal.CourseWithActivePlans

Represents the basic information about the course and the active plans within it.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
CourseId

Id of the course.

 integer

None.
CourseSyncKey

Course synchronization key.

 string

None.
CourseTitle

Title of the course.

 string

None.
PlanIds

List of active plans' ids.

 Collection of string

None.
